user.title: Simple Cue
user.description:
Add the Simple Cue integration. Schedule named one-shot triggers for your automations.

The MCP server lets your AI assistant set and cancel timers by voice.

data_description.mcp_port: Port for the built-in MCP SSE server (default: 8766). After setup, point Home Assistant's MCP integration at http://homeassistant.local:{port}/sse.
